There are no shipments for this location.
Try changing the location or check back later.
Discrepancies can't be edited from mobile. Open Quantify on desktop to reconcile.
23 unaccounted for — split them across destinations below
Goes to job site as expected
Office will review 4 variances and 2 flagged items before rent starts.
Add a note for the office team…
Your counts go to the office for review. Rent begins only after the office confirms and the truck reaches the customer.

This pre-return started with an empty list.
Add items as they come off the truck.
Add items as you count them off the truck
Tap the button below to add items as they come off the truck.
Rent will start when office confirms and the truck arrives at Phillips 66 Bayway Refinery.
Quantify will auto-generate the next loading session for the remaining items once this one is confirmed.
